ocr_findings.description: Answer key line reads '問題15-28 エ 問題15-29 ア' in the image but OCR outputs '問題15-28 工 問題15-29 ア' — katakana answer letter 'エ' (choice label) misread as kanji '工' (craft/work), directly corrupting the answer key for Q15-28.

reviewer_notes: Exam page with 問題15-28 (無線LAN盗聴対策) and 問題15-29 (ハードディスク情報漏えい防止) plus 解答・解説 for answers 15-15 through 15-18. Critical error: answer letter エ for Q15-28 misread as kanji 工, which is a high-severity wrong_char that corrupts the answer key.
